title: baeckea ciliata
intro: Baeckea ciliata, also known as the native or scrub baeckea, is a small shrub native to Australia, characterized by its tiny white flowers and narrow leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Baeckea ciliata include its ability to treat skin conditions, wounds, and infections, as well as its potential to alleviate digestive issues and reduce fever. Baeckea ciliata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
